entry.title: Re: SAP CPI SFTP sender adapter unable to read the files...
entry.content: Hi Amar, I tried with this following FileName Pattrerns: * FileName Pattrerns: .* FileName Pattrerns: *.xml FileName Pattrerns: empty FileName Pattrerns: test.*

entry.title: Boleto de Concessionárias CNAB 240 - Segmento O
entry.content:
Olá experts

Estou configurando o segmento O no DMEE utilizando o layout BR_FEBRABAN_A, porém estou com dúvida a respeito do código de barras.

Pagamentos a concessionárias possuem código de barras de 48 posições, porém no SAP ECC temos o campo com somente 47 posições.

Existe alguma forma de converter as 47 posições em 48 através do cálculo dos dígitos? Ou seria possível criar uma tabela Z para alimentar os dados e parametrizar o atributo na DMEE para buscar dessa tabela. Vi também que existe a sugestão da SAP do uso do campo BSEG-SGTXT, mas não sei como codificar ou especificar para que tal campo seja lido.

Agradeço desde já pelas sugestões e ajuda.

#FEBRABAN

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI SFTP sender adapter unable to read the files...
entry.content: Try test.*. As per the official SFTP document, at least empty should have picked all the files. I would suggest opening a ticket with SAP on this.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handli...
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately, the documentation also states that the messages get transported to the sap-messages header of the http response. Error messages go to the error response in the body of the response.

For state messages, the messages should be part of the object response.

Cheers,

Geert-Jan

entry.title: Re: How to make configurations for new button of SAP note 3210908
entry.content:
Hi;

To use the smartform printer you must click on the "printer" button

The "Display PDF" Button will call the BRF+ output management.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Bugtoberfest 2024
entry.content: jq Bug's answers are a bug 😉

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: I do thank you. I am new in the community but will catchup soon

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, my name is Saad Hussain, currently based out of India. I have been learning SAP for the past 10+ years now.
I am an SAP BASIS consultant with experience in System Installations, Upgrades, Database administration (incl. DB2, ASE, HANA, MaxDB), SolMan 7.2, Azure Cloud migration, S/4HANA Conversion readiness and AMS support.

I am glad to be a part of this community and excitedly looking forward to learning more..

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 3 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Please note that while we are publishing contest activities on Friday, October 11th; many badge assignments won't be active in the system until Monday, October 14th.  If you happen to complete a contest activity before the badge is active, that's OK. You'll still get credit for it. It just won't show up in your gameboard totals until the new badges are activated and assigned.

If you are looking for Week 1 activities, they can be found here: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities - SAP Community

If you are looking for Week 2 activities, they can be found here: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities - SAP Community

Welcome to Devtoberfest 2024! We are back again this year with 4 weeks of fun and learning! Starting on September 23rd you can take part in the Devtoberfest contest (CONTEST OFFICIAL RULES HERE) and collect points for tutorials, quizzes and live sessions! Collect as many points as possible until the 25th of October and qualify for prizes such a trip to next year's SAP TechEd in person experience! For general information check out the overview about taking part in the contest here: Devtoberfest Contest - SAP Community Groups 

The table below shows you the points you can earn in the second week of Devtoberfest! Every week we will post an update with the new activities that will get you points in the contest! Each activity will earn you a badge applied to your SAP Community ID and points that you can track on the “for fun only” Devtoberfest Gameboard. The scavenger hunt is also back this year! The tutorials, quizzes and fun activities to earn even more points as part of the scavenger hunt will be posted here later in week 3. And don't forget about Fun Friday Activities.  This week's Fun Friday activity will be 🟡 Bugtoberfest 2024 - SAP Community

List of activities for contest week 3: 

DAYBADGE CODECONTENTPOINTS
Monday   
Monday#CDD9D5Devtoberfest 2024 - ABAP, Week 3, Oct. 141200
Monday#170418Install the abapGit Plugin250
Monday#030402Push Your ABAP Source Code from SAP BTP, ABAP Environment to a GitHub Repository using abapGit100
Monday#81A7F8Create an ABAP Project in ABAP Development Tools (ADT)150
Monday#C8EFA9Devtoberfest 2024 - CAP, Week 3, Oct 141200
Monday#BFAB9FUse a Local Launch Page100
Monday#201300Add Authorization200
Monday#EDBBACAdd Test Cases300
Monday#F1F3E2Prepare for Production200
Tuesday   
Tuesday#032027Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Week 3, Oct. 151200
Tuesday#B690D5Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Watch Trigger Process Video300
Tuesday#F48FDDSet Up SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Using a Trial Account50
Tuesday#F3D0EFCreate a Site Using SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition50
Tuesday#CCF0FEIntegrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone100
Tuesday#7E603DIntegrate a URL App to SAP Build Work Zone150
Tuesday#06160DDesign Your Site With the New SAP Build Work Zone Experience100
Wednesday   
Wednesday#72B85BDevtoberfest 2024 - Integration, Week 3, Oct. 161200
Wednesday#C8DDFAIntegrate SAP Build Apps with SAP Integration Suite250
Wednesday#F8FAFDMaintain Filters for Outbound Event Topics250
Wednesday#748556Event Processing in an SAP S/4HANA on-premise system450
Wednesday#F7E2DCHow to Create RAP Business Events in an On-Premise system450
Wednesday#69D2E9Set Up Your CAP Application for Eventing400
Wednesday#4D3B53Enable Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP BTP200
Wednesday#617176Use Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to Update Your Deployed CAP Application300
Wednesday#63481EEnable Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP BTP200
Wednesday#E0EEEEUse Events from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to Update Your Deployed CAP Application300
Thursday   
Thursday#C5313EDevtoberfest 2024 - MAD (ML, AI & Data), Week 3 - Oct. 171200
Thursday#C7D6C2Use Data Attribute Recommendation to Classify Records, Delete Model and Dataset150
Thursday#743679Use Data Attribute Recommendation With Your Own Dataset300
Friday   
Friday#E3E8E9Devtoberfest 2024 - Frontend, Week 3, Oct. 181200
Friday#215B58Get Started with UI5 Web Components for React150
Friday#DADBE0Create a Card Component150
Fun Friday   
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest JavaScript1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest ABAP1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest Python1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest Bash1000
Fun Friday Devtoberfest 2024 - Fun Friday Week 3 - Bugtoberfest jq1000

entry.title: Re: Is Single Tenancy for LLMs Available in SAP GenAI Hub...
entry.content:
Hi Faizaan

Generative AI Hub runs on the customer subaccount, so its single tenant.

The LLM (if hosted by SAP) will run in your subaccount, so, also single tenant.

The Multi tenancy concept in AI Core is used as a leverage if you want to isolate your AI assets

entry.title: Re: Enable only one checkbox in group
entry.content:
You can also have the option for PARAMETERS to assign them to the same RADIOBUTTON GROUP. This way you ensure the selection of only one of them, being part of the same group.

For example:

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK what_to_save WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-009.

PARAMETERS p_both RADIOBUTTON GROUP save DEFAULT 'X'.

PARAMETERS p_texto RADIOBUTTON GROUP save.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK what_to_save.

entry.title: Re: Missing Automated Defect Recording Pop Up for QM-Quality Notification
entry.content: Test

entry.title: Catalog Profile Assignment for Process Quality Tasks - PEO
entry.content:
Our client is using PEO for their manufacturing solution.  When they post a defect, they go to Process Quality Tasks F3250.  

When they use the dropdown for the task catalog, they are seeing entries that may be shared by other modules (e.g., Plant Maintenance or Customer Service).  They would prefer to see only the tasks/ catalogs that are specific to their area.

The literature appears to indicate that one can configure and assign a catalog profile to limit what they see, but it indicates that the configuration for this is in the BOM settings in the PEO IMG.  When we look at the BOM settings, there is no such entry.


Has anyone tried to set up catalog profiles for quality task processing in PEO (app F3250)

entry.title: BO Performance Issue - 12 million instances created
entry.content:
How long will it take for the Limit function to eliminate 13 million instances of a report? Is the limit function "pauseable" via unchecking the limit on that folder if we notice performance issues with the application during regular operations while this large volume action is occuring?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BO Performance Issue - 12 million instances created
entry.content: Eliminating such a large volume of report instances (13 million) can take considerable time—potentially hours or even days. We recommend splitting the task into batches to minimize performance impacts. For example, applying the Limit on smaller subsets of the data rather than on the entire 13 million records at once. Also, please note the Limit function is not "pauseable". Once the process has started, it will continue to run until it is completed.

entry.title: Process Automation My Inbox App - How to validate Forward-to
entry.content:
With the Process Automation application “My Inbox”, The “Forward” button allows us to enter any email address.

We need to validate the Forward-ee and respond with an error if invalid user is entered.

Reason being that users often enter invalid email addresses and causes tasks disappear and stuck.

Although we are using our custom-developed Inbox screen but found no way to customize the behavior of the

Forward/Claim buttons.

We tried to this.getInboxAPI().removeAcction("forward") (or "FORWARD", "Forward") to remove it (in Component.js) so we can add our own custom Forward button but can't remove it.

(Btw, we cannot remove it by unchecking the "Allow Forwarding" from design time. If we do so, we cannot call the Forward API anymore)

No java script from Component.js or UI5 handler works because the Forward/Claim buttons are added after the custom UI5 screen is loaded.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Deep linking to SAP SuccessFactors Standard Portlets and Custom MDF portlets
entry.content:
You can also use block Id for creating deep links to a standard portlet, for example

https://salesdemo.successfactors.eu/sf/personalinfo?blockId=blockxyz&bplte_company=<companyID>

entry.title: Re: How to generate a wrapper for function modules (BAPIs) in tier 2
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer,

Can we expect a similar tool for classes in the (near) future?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Barcode/QR Scanner in SAPUI5
entry.content: Only run BAS. In work zone don't open camera.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano & Digital Skill Initiative Team,

I hope my message finds you good in health.

This i got to know one of friends that they applied as she was working in a HR. This caught my eye and i heard about SAP a lot from many of in many of circle friends and close relationships. I did a bit research in Travel Expense Management and got to know that there is a niece product in the market by SAP which is SAP Concur which help organizations with travel and expense management.

Its always interests me of managing your expense either self or travel. In the world expense management it is very important for organizations to manage their expenses through SAP Concur which helps Companies to manage their employees travel expense seamlessly with less hassle and with standard process and workflow help organization to transform

This i all learned in Travel Expense Learning journey which built my interest more in Travel and Expense Management. I would surely pursue this as a career path and considering as a career switch as well which will help me get into SAP Digital innovation and get to know more about products and services.

I would really appreciate for a chance to certify in this product and try upscaling myself in applying to one of SAP Partners or SAP.

Look forward to hear from your @David_Chaviano soon.

Thanks

entry.title: PLM System Integration (PLMSI) response log level
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am currently in the process of configuring PLMSI 3.0.

When I use the Gateway Client or the PLM system to send a request, I usually receive a response with a lot of information.
In the response, there are different log levels (types): Error, Warning, and Info.

The PLM system that receives the response is, from time to time, not able to receive all information, since the buffer is limited.

Is there a possibility to reduce the "Verbose Mode"?
E.g. I only want to receive messages of the type "Error", or (if successful), I only want to receive the information "success".

 

Greetings
Ric

entry.title: Re: APM capabilities with PEPM/PMPM?
entry.content:
Hi C-K,

APM has predefined transaction fields to hold Contract and Member Counts that are used in PEPM/PMPM calcs for some of our other customers.

Our configurable rate tables can be used to create Group specific rates as well. The example below shows AF2005 receives $12/ PCPM while every other Medical group gets $10.  Additional, this Rate table has a provision to make sure at LEAST $1 of premium is paid on this group before a payment is calculated.

The Broker Type (and Coverage Type) can also be added to the APM Rate Table to accommodate different Broker/Coverage Types in a single Hierarchy or in a ownership split situation.

APM was designed and developed with the insurance industry in mind so all of these common payment scenarios have been implemented over the years. Please feel to reach out with more questions and I can do a quick demo of the rate table structures in APM.

Thank you!

Phillip

Phillip.butts@sap.com

entry.title: Re: IAS User/Group management from multiple Identity Prov...
entry.content:
Have you tried the new CIS API? https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/migrating-identity-authentication-scim-rest-api-to-identity-directory-service-api

This one supports patch method which normally would allow you to solve this problem. See the api on apihub: https://api.sap.com/api/IdDS_SCIM/resource/Groups

entry.title: Re: Migrate extended app from WEBIDE to BAS
entry.content:
You can make the move to BAS by pushing to git in Web IDE and pulling from git in BAS. In BAS you can use the migration tool for it which will add some config files but normally doesn't touch any of your business logic.

If it doesn't come up in the list of apps for migration, you can also add the new config files yourself by generating a new extension as an example in BAS by following this blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extending-legacy-fiori-apps-in-bas/ba-p/13579887

entry.title: Re: Table for maintenance plan and maintenance cycle and Unit
entry.content: b

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handli...
entry.content:
I think this is not supported for the moment:

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/java/event-handlers/indicating-errors#messages

You could try to set the messages manually in the response header, maybe using the express response. 

Kr, Wouter

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content: The destination should only contain lowercase and no underscore in the name: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/tunneled-access-to-sap-s-4hana-apps

entry.title: What does the 'Y' in 'YCOA' stand for? Something Chart of Accounts
Re: Using workzone on separate subaccount from application
entry.content:
Does your application has an approuter? You need to take the hostname from the approuter and not your service.

Can you also share your destination?

Something you could have a look at which might be interesting: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/settings-for-html-business-solutions-work-in-progress

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content: Yes, good catch @WouterLemaire on the lowercase and underscore comment.

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl.flexState
entry.content: Seems like a bug to me. Have you submitted an SAP note?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Bugtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
My goodness! You're right. Thank you for pointing that out. That is fixed and the tutorial should be updated shortly. 

Edit: The tutorials have all been checked and all found bugs have been fixed. The jq tutorial now has the correct question and answers.

entry.title: Re: VA05-> Enhancement LOG_SD_REPORT_OPT business functio...
entry.content:
Join will not work for if your target table is one of the database tables selected by default in the badi. Create a custom database view or cds view on VBPA with only the key fields and your required fields. Then try the code below. (ZVBPAWE is the view)

 

    INSERT VALUE #( table         = 'ZVBPAWE'
                    field         = 'LAND1'
                    name          = 'ZLAND1' )
      INTO TABLE ct_result_comp.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_field = 'VBELN'
                    source_table = 'VBAK'
                    source_field = 'VBELN' )
      INTO TABLE lt_join_metadata.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_field   = 'POSNR'
                    constant_value = '000000' ) 
      INTO TABLE lt_join_metadata.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_field   = 'PARVW'
                    constant_value = 'WE' ) 
      INTO TABLE lt_join_metadata.

    INSERT VALUE #( target_table  = 'ZVBPAWE'
                    join_metadata = lt_join_metadata )
      INTO TABLE ct_additional_table_metadata.

entry.title: Re: Range Compress for dump SAPSQL_STMNT_TOO_LARGE
entry.content:
Hi @Sandra_Rossi ,

I updated the code regarding your findings. Thank you for your valuable suggestions.

Unfortunately I dont have time about obsolete objects. If required, he/she who wants to use this code can translate it to OO.

entry.title: Re: Activity and Cost Planning: Flexible Upload Process: Part 1: Configuration & Layout designin
entry.content: do you think, the steps are defined correctly?

entry.title: Re: Turn on "Show Navigation Arrows" in all Book pages in...
entry.content:
Hi @shaunmacadam,

Authoring Settings (that are active in your workarea) -> Book Page Initialization -> Page

Activate the "Show Navigations Arrows" there. Save changes. Enjoy.

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl.flexState
entry.content: I have not yet submitted a SAP Note. My initial thought was to ask the community first.

entry.title: Re: Work Center Data Need
entry.content:
The connection saved in the Routing， and one finished material may have more than one routing.  

1. You should find  all the routing for the finished material.

In table MAPL, you can find the material and routing.

2. In the routing, to check whether the specific work center be used in this routing.

BADI for display routing: ARO_ROUTING_READ

You can also try to use CA80 to check the specific work center where used in the routing.

entry.title: Re: Internet Explorer 11 will no longer be supported by various SAP UI technologies in newer release
entry.content:
1. open options in toolbar

2. update HTML Control from Internet Explorer to Edge

entry.title: Cancel Rejection for Reason
entry.content:
Dear all,

I created and changed a new Quoation thro VA22 relying on an old order number（The old order has been completed）,and created thro VF01.And then reject by Rejection by reason,so this new order has been completed. Please help me how to do next step if wanna cancel the wrong quoation and billing documet?Could I cancel the rejection?

entry.title: Debug inbound queue in ECC from APO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am unable to debug the inbound queue in SAP ECC for a process executed from APO with transaction
/N/SAPAPO/BOP.

The inbound queue CF* never appears in SAP ECC.

I performed the following steps:

  1. Unregistered CF* in SAP ECC in transaction SMQR

  2. Enabled debugging in SAP APO in transaction /SAPAPO/C4

  3. Executed the scenario in transaction /N/SAPAPO/BOP

     

  4. Checked SMQ1 and the CF* queue appears in APO's outbound queue

     

  5. Executed the outbound queue in APO

     

  6. Checked SMQ2 in ECC and couldn't find the CF* inbound queue

     

I also tried forcing an error by keeping the sales order open in ECC, but the error returns in APO's outbound queue when I need it to appear in ECC's inbound queue.

 

Why doesn't the inbound queue appear in ECC?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: SAP HCM - ESS: Incorrect Values Reflected in Filed Leaves
entry.content:
Hello All,

Currently, we are experiencing issues in ESS. Some employees who submitted leave requests have had them processed successfully, however, the recorded ‘Absence hours’ shows zero (0), and the "Used" field is blank/zero when checking their filed leaves. While other employees can file successfully without any issue. After further investigation, we discovered that the issue began on October 5, 2024, based on the leave requests submitted by employees. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Using PIRS, PMRP and MRP adopt time conflicts.
entry.content: Use separate planning horizons for PMRP and MRP, and allow for phase inconsistencies within the time periods. PMRP evaluates capacity for the current month, while MRP releases production recommendations based on the first working day of the month as the demand date.

entry.title: Ariba: In SCC-SBN how to send email notification to the Buyers to inform them of open approval item.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to send email notification to the Buyers to inform them of open approval item in Order Confirmation Deviation Approval.

Below screenshot is from the configuration guide. I am not able to understand clearly. It says we can add 5 emails under "Contact" element where exactly is this we need to configure?

What configuration needs to be done? or any CIG mapping required or any SR ticket needs to be raised?

In SBN-->Notification, I can configure upto 3 email address.(screenshot1)

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to remove a material extension from a...
entry.content: Hi Rashid, this is interesting, but it's not directly related to my question. Let me also clarify, we are using S4 Hana Cloud. To try to ask my question more plainly, if we maintain a distribution chain, which we later stop using because we start using common distribution channels, can we get the application Manage Product Master Data to ignore the old extension? Every time we try to save any piece of data in the application, we get a hard error saying we've maintained an invalid sales area. Thanks.

entry.title: Do service orders take into account common distribution channels and divisions?
entry.content:
We are using service orders in S4 public cloud.  When creating a service order for a non-stock good which is externally sourced, the expected action is it's supposed to trigger a purchase requisition.  However, it's getting an error saying that the material is not extended to the specified distribution channel.  It's worth noting, that the material is not specifically extended to the cited distribution channel, because we are using common distribution channels, so all materials should be extended to only one.  So this begs the question, can service orders work if you are maintaining common distribution channels?  

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I am from Vietnam and still pursuing my studies, but I have a strong passion for ERP solutions and software development, particularly in the area of ABAP within SAP system.

As a Vietnamese student and a first-generation college attendee from my family, I aspire to contribute to the development of the IT field both domestically and internationally.

Becoming a professional ABAP developer is my goal for the future, and I believe that obtaining an SAP certification will help me enhance my skills and add greater value to the companies I will work for. I kindly ask you to consider my application for the SAP certification program.

entry.title: #sitMUC 2024: Last-Minute Details Inside
entry.content:
Get ready for an amazing day at #sitMUC 2024!
Find all the last-minute details you need right here:

Saturday 12 October 2024, from 09:00 to 18:00

Location:
SAP Labs Munich (MUE03)
Friedrich-Ludwig-Bauer-Straße 5, 85748 Garching bei München

Accessibility:

  • By U-Bahn: Line U6
    Get off at "Garching Forschungszentrum" station
    Walking directions from the U-Bahn to SAP (11min): OpenStreetMap
    (Following Google Maps is not recommended. Please see the OpenStreetMap image/link instead)
  • By Car: Free Parking available
    Onsite parking at the Labs building
    Additional spaces outside

Event Links: Community.sap.com  |  sitmuc.com/24

Agenda: Link

Looking forward to seeing you all there!

Cheers,
Your sitMUC Orga Team

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS PLACE IN SD DOCUMENT
entry.content: Can you please check Assign business places to plant for Goods and Services Tax for India (ID: 101316)?

entry.title: Re: What is the best ERP for a Startup?
entry.content:
Hi!

Some basic questions to start with - how big is your company in people size, what process do you want to cover? Basic finance? Procurement and Inventory mng? People management? Do you provide services and need billing? Or basic ability to issue invoice is enough?

i would start woth SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud ERP. SAP for GROW offering - it is more simple, friendly licensing and scalable. Start with basic finance functions and then gradually add more functions, processes.

entry.title: Re: Message no. FINS_ACDOC_POST094 Perform foreign currency
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I just completed the course "Develop Applications Running on SAP BTP Using SAP HANA Cloud" and earned my SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA Cloud 1.0 certification! I'm really passionate about working with SAP and seeing how it can improve business processes. Technology is amazing in how it can make such a big difference. I’m eager to continue learning and growing in this field. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Linkage Between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Avoid hard coding time periods in SAC Planning data actions
entry.content:
Maybe you can try with something like this: 


MEMBERSET [d/Date] = PREVIOUS(9,"MONTH", %PERIOD_FORECAST%) TO %PERIOD_FORECAST%
MEMBERSET ...

VARIABLEMEMBER #PERIOD_VERSIE OF [d/Date]
VARIABLEMEMBER #PERIOD_VERSIE_VERGELIJK OF [d/Date]

DATA([d/Date] = #PERIOD_VERSIE) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE%)
DATA([d/Date] = #PERIOD_VERSIE_VERGELIJK) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %BASELINE_INDEX_VERSIE_VERGELIJK%)

DATA( [d/Date] = %PERIOD_FORECAST%) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #PERIOD_VERSIE)/RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #PERIOD_VERSIE_VERGELIJK)

entry.title: 月结后发现生产订单报工错误
entry.content:
各位专家好：

      目前遇到个问题，我们有个生产订单在8月错误报工并且订单已经完工收货，然后在10月才发现，导致该订单在8月月结后分摊了很大的成本在订单中，使成品物料的成本很大。现在要如何操作才能把那部分错误分摊的成本冲销或调整掉？

      PS：我们的物料账期MMPV已经开到了9月和10月

we are sending sales docuements by outlook. I´dont have the the option "view sent emails" in our context menu. Is there any setting necessary?

thx!!

entry.title: Re: Configuring OAuth 2.0 between SAP C4C and SAP BTP

entry.title: Cannot release transport request in ABAP Cloud Project although I only receive ATC warnings
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I cannot release my transport request in ABAP Cloud Project although I only receive ATC warnings. Documentation says, that only errors have to be solved.

Does anyone know, what I must do to get my transport request released?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Upload picture to document information extraction via Custom JavaScript or SAP BTP Destin-CORS E
entry.content: Hi .. Did you found any solution for this issue. or any other workaround for same.

entry.title: Re: Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Implementation Class?
entry.content: Is there no solution for this important topic? Errors in Popups can occur and should be displayed!

entry.title: Creating a popup with depending fields
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I need to develop a Popup for a Fiori APP/serivce via REST in BTP, with two fields. Both fields need a value help or drop down list. The possible values list of field 2 are depending on the entered value in field 1. Both fields are mandatory, so I must garantee that either the field 2 can be maintained only if a value in field 1 is given or I need to display a messasge to inform the user that he has to maintain field 1 first. 

Regarding the message, I already created a Question - unfortunately without a usefull answer.

Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Imple... - SAP Community

Does anyone know, how to solve this basic reuqirement?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Plant "phased" roll out of SAP S4/HANA for Product Co...
entry.content:
Hello Paulo

now to may topics are now "mixed" with each other. 

I try to exlpain step by step

1.) EHS Classic => Here you can do ALE between systems etc

2.) Product Compliance => currently no support is available for a SAP distributed landscape, The topic is on SAP Roadmap

3.) You can onyl acticate Product Compliance by "process". With 2023 i you can e.g. only activate "DG" but not the rest etc. and for the rest you can use EHS Classic in parallel (but you can not use PC DG and EHS Classic DG solution parallel).

BUT if you activate PC (for whatver subfunction") you must use PC (and you can not use EHS Classic) any more

The topic you are highlighting (plant code based roll out (or company code or similar object) is not supported and i can see no chance to get this

So the "3E Adpater" and the SAP solution can help to use EHS classic and PC in parallel

So we have to wait fo SAP; next on premise version will come roughly 2025; what we will get.. we will see..

C.B.

PS: Please check discussion running here: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/s-4-hana-hybrid-connector-classic-vs-new-product-compliance-solution/qaq-p/13880661

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Cloud Platform Transport Management service for SAP CPI Cloud Foundry environmen
entry.content:
Hi Team,

i have successfully created the destination, connection is established.

Output: Connection to "Content_Assembly_Service" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized"

 

We have done the configuration in integration level, facing the below error: 

Destination configuration not found in destination info Destination name: ContentAssemblyService

 

Please help for this issue

i have successfully created the destination, connection is established.

Output: Connection to "Content_Assembly_Service" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized"

 

We have done the configuration in integration level, facing the below error: 

Destination configuration not found in destination info Destination name: ContentAssemblyService

 

Please help for this issue

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

       I hope this message finds you well. I first encountered SAP during my time in the United States Army, where we were transitioning from an outdated ERP system to GCSS-Army, which is based on SAP. Unfortunately, this transition occurred as I was leaving the military, so I didn't have much opportunity to work with SAP. However, I found the system to be fascinating.

     Currently, I work for the U.S. government, utilizing GCSS-Army primarily to pull reports and display data. While this has given me some exposure to the system, I am eager to deepen my understanding and engage with SAP beyond just data retrieval. I've been watching YouTube videos to learn more about its full capabilities, and I'm excited about the prospect of expanding my knowledge and skills in this area. As a disabled veteran, a first-generation college graduate, and a member of a minority group, I am particularly motivated to pursue this opportunity. Thank you for your time, and I look forward to any guidance you may have.

 

Best regards,

Alexander Conner

entry.title: About the default condition types of item in Sales order
entry.content:
When creating a sales order and looking at the price conditions of the material item, where does the default price type shown below come from and appear as shown below?

PPR0, YZWR, DCD2, PCIP

Please answer for me. 

Best regard.

entry.title: SOLMAN Test Suite Analytics: Overview and Access
entry.content:
SOLMAN Test Suite Analytics: Overview and Access

SAP Solution Manager’s Test Suite Analytics provides robust features for monitoring and analyzing testing activities. These analytics tools help manage test execution, track defects, and optimize test coverage, ensuring the quality of SAP systems. Below is a detailed summary of how to access these features and leverage them effectively.

How to Access Test Suite Analytics:

  1. Navigating to SAP Test Suite in SAP Solution Manager:

    • Launch the Fiori Launchpad from SAP Solution Manager.
    • Ensure that your user role has sufficient permissions to view test plans and analytics dashboards.

  2. Accessing Key Tabs and Tiles:

    • Tile: Test Suite – Overview
      • Navigate to the "Overview" tile to access high-level test status insights.
    • Tabs:
      • Test Planning Tab:
        View which test plans are ready for execution, monitor the status of test packages, and check for any open defects.
      • Test Execution Tab:
        Identify test packages assigned to you, planned start and end dates, and the status of assigned test cases.

Analytics Features and Reports:

  1. Completeness and Gap Reports:

    • Use this feature to determine which test cases are not yet assigned to a test plan, ensuring comprehensive coverage of all scenarios.

  2. Status and Progress Reports:

    • Track the real-time status of test plans and packages. These reports indicate:
      • Which test plans are in progress or completed.
      • The number of open defects associated with each plan or package.
      • Trends in defect resolution over time.

  3. Defect Analytics:

    • Defect Status and Priority:
      Analyze defects based on their current state (e.g., open, closed) and priority (high, medium, low).
    • Operation Test Effort Analytics:
      Measure the effort and time spent on resolving defects and compare it with historical data.

  4. Test Execution Analytics:

    • Monitor the number of test cases executed across testers and departments.
    • The dashboard provides metrics such as:
      • Test cases performed per tester.
      • Test cases in error without defects.
      • Active vs. passive testers and their contributions.

Using KPIs and Dashboards:

  1. Test Suite Dashboard:

    • Access the KPI Dashboard via the “Test Suite” tile.
    • Visualize key metrics such as:
      • Total number of resolved defects.
      • Number of defects per test plan, package, or test case.
      • Active testers vs. passive testers, helping optimize resource allocation.

  2. Test Case and Package Analytics:

    • Multiple Test Plan Status:
      Review status summaries for multiple test plans, including detailed analysis of individual test cases and packages.
    • Test Plans – Node and Test Case Changes:
      Monitor changes to nodes within a test plan to ensure no critical tests are omitted after modifications.

Generating Test Reports:

  • Test Plan Defect Analysis:
    Navigate to the relevant test plan to view detailed defect analytics and trends.
  • Generating Summary Test Reports:
    • Use the built-in reporting tools to create MS Word reports with:
      • Test plan details and status.
      • System landscape and solution documentation.
      • Lists of defects and their resolution statuses.
    • Reports are customizable with multiple selection parameters to fit project needs.

Conclusion:

SAP Solution Manager’s Test Suite Analytics provides essential tools for managing and optimizing testing processes. By accessing the Fiori Launchpad and using the appropriate tiles and dashboards, test managers and testers can monitor progress, manage defects, and ensure complete test coverage. With actionable insights from KPIs and comprehensive reports, teams can improve testing efficiency, minimize risks, and ensure smooth SAP deployments.

entry.title: Re: Starting out developing skills in analytics? Not sure where to start?
entry.content: "I've gained proficiency in SAC SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere, but I'm finding it overwhelming to delve into HANA, BW/4HANA, R, and JavaScript to effectively perform data analysis. Given my current skillset, could you provide guidance on the most valuable areas to focus on for achieving impactful results without feeling overwhelmed by the sheer number of technologies?" @MarkGreen

entry.title: Re: Sales tax to be applied as per ship to country
entry.content: Hi Anand , Have you found the solution to this problem ?

entry.title: Bill Of material (BOM)
entry.content:
Bill of Material (BOM) 

What is Bill of Material (BOM) and its role?

A bill of material is a complete, formally structured list of the components that make up a product or assembly. 

BOM can be single level and multi-level. For example, finished material would contain semi-finished materials as components which in turn would contain raw materials as components in next level.

Bill of Material having component number, description with quantity and unit measure.

There can be different alternative BOMs for a product depending upon the lot sizes, validity dates, and different production methods.

BOM is used in production planning for semi-finished and purchase planning for raw materials.

 

  • Use T code CS01 in SAP Easy Access

Enter Header Material and Plant, Select BOM Usage 1  Production

  • Enter the component that required to produce the product.

Quantity - Enter Material Quantity required

BOM Header

Tap on BOM Header to maintain the base quantity.

When we create more than 1 BOM of a product, it’s called Alternative BOM

When alternative BOM is more than 1 it’s called multiple BOM

BOM Status:

BOM Status should be 1 Active BOM which we ae going to use in transaction.

BOM Line Item

Select Item and select on item tab or double click on item.

Operation scrap refers to the expected material loss during a specific operation during production process.

When the material is a component, and is used as a part of an assembly and there is a loss when using that component. 

Recursive BOM can be understood as the material that uses the same header material for its make. You can also take an example of Curd we need curd to make curd so this is perfect example of Recursive BOM.

BOM Configuration:

1.Define default value [ Base Quantity Header and BOM Status]

To define default base quantity of header and default BOM status

 

  1. Determine the BOM Explosion mode

To define default Explosion Mode for BOM Header

Enable BOM Validity calculation

 2. Define BOM Usage

Define the BOM usage as per user requirement in which area use want to use

3. Define BOM Status

BOM status define for BOM availability for Transaction in various area like costing, plan order, Sales order etc.

  1. Define Allowed material type for BOM item

 To define Material type which we are going to use for BOM item in BOM usage 1 with respect to BOM header

BOM Like: FERT, HALB ETC.

BOM like: ROH, HALB RTC.

[ + Allowed, - Not Allowed]

BOM Reporting

T codes

CS11: Level by Level BOM Explosion

CS12: Multi Level BOM Explosion

CS13: Summarized BOM

CS14: BOM Comparison

CS15 : Where used material List

 

  • There might be the case wherein component material does not exist. For this, you need to create the material master for the component material before creating BOM.
  • Some users try to create the BOM again for the same Product, system gives warning message regarding “Alternative BOM2 is being created” and they tend to ignore the warning message and move forward and hence end up in creating similar alternative BOM 2 for same product. This unnecessary creates duplicate data.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Re: Non-archiving solution for GRACAUDITLOG data cleanup in SAP GRC
entry.content:
Thanks Mate for your feedback, it's an alternate solution to clean up the EAM data as per retention policy and depends on customers whether they use this program or archiving solution. Also, we need to follow SAP recommendation and that suggested by you as well. Thanks

Regards,

Shiv

entry.title: How to connect to Analytic Model in Power BI
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am importing a data source in SAP Datasphere with ODBC connector and using it in PBI.

I tried to use Analytic Model from datasphere in PBI.

But calculated and restricted measures created in Analytic Model are not displayed.

Only the fact tables are imported.

 

Is there a way to connect and use the Analytic Model in PBI?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano  
I appreciate SAP's commitment to supporting cloud learning and the Digital Skills Initiative.

entry.title: PPDS on SAP GUI for Java known issues
entry.content:
Hy guys,

I am currently using a Mac M3 with sap gui for Java 7.8. At the moment I am trying to learn PPDS and have noticed i can’t open CDPS0 on gui because it can’t execute „Control“ because its only supported for windows. Are there any other known issues regarding PPDS and sap GUI for Java?

 

I already asked our IT but they won’t support installing a windows VM and doing it by myself would be against company regulations. Has anyone found a workaround to this issue? I really would like to keep the Mac, but if it’s not possible i guess I have to ask for a windows notebook again. Using the fioris is not an option because I have been told/ shown that it doesn’t have the same functions as in GUI.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: maintenance plan fixed call date on last day of every...
entry.content:
Hey there,
The solution is already provided here:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/maintenance-plan-scheduling-by-key-date/qaq-p/703203

I've checked it myself, and yes - it works.

What u gotta do in a nutshell in the Maintenance Plan setup:
1. Cycle and unit: 1 DAY
2. Scheduling indicator: Factory Calendar
3. Factory Calendar: AM
4. Scheduling period: doesn't matter, go with 3M if u want 3 month preview
5. Start of cycle: end of the month u select

Cheers,
Dan

entry.title: Re: Consuming a REST Service with the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Hi 

I have a similar requirement where I need to convert solr response into odata using a java service. I have the actual response which are search results and some metadata. The problem is, the main search filters are part of $expand($filter) as the main entity is contained in a wrapper. I have 2 doubts related to this.

1) How can I set metadata tags like nextLink manually in odata response ?

2) How can I read $filter inside $expand ?

 

I am using sap cap java. 

Regards

Sparsh

entry.title: Re: PPDS on SAP GUI for Java known issues

entry.title: Re: PPDS on SAP GUI for Java known issues
entry.content: This is the SAP Note regarding that issue https://me.sap.com/notes/0002616384

entry.title: My intro
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
My name is Faith and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I’m originally from NJ but I am based out in TX. I graduated from Rutgers University with a bachelor’s degree in information systems, in 2020. I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in business processes and implementation and regulations.
I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because it will help my career path in becoming a GRC analyst & expand my knowledge in other areas of IT. I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in cybersecurity or the GRC side of cybersecurity. Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!
Best regards,

entry.content: Insightful
